workflows.name: B2B Cold Outreach
workflows.description: End-to-end B2B cold outreach pipeline from prospect research through follow-up management

steps.label: Research Prospect
steps.sop: Research the prospect: company size, industry, role, recent news, pain points. Check LinkedIn and company website. Document findings.

steps.label: Draft Cold Email
steps.sop: Write personalised cold email following tone rules. No forbidden words. Value-first, max 5 sentences. Save to staging/ as TRADE_{company}_{date}.md

steps.label: Review & Approve Draft
steps.sop: Human reviews email draft. Check for tone, accuracy, forbidden words, and personalisation. Approve, edit, or reject.

steps.label: Send Email
steps.sop: Send approved email. Update CRM status from email_draft to email_sent. Log send time for follow-up scheduling.

steps.label: Monitor for Reply
steps.sop: Monitor inbox for prospect reply. On reply: update CRM to reply_detected, classify sentiment (positive/negative/neutral), notify human.

steps.label: Follow-Up Sequence
steps.sop: If no reply after 72h: draft follow-up with new angle. If no reply after 5 more days: draft final breakup email. Each follow-up goes through review gate before sending.
